name: Zucchine Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Squeeze the shredded zucchini to remove excess water and place it in a food processor or blender.
2. Add the scallions, lemon juice, sugar, salt, white pepper, and dill weed to the zucchini.
3. Process until smooth.
4. Stir in the sour cream until well combined.
5. Chill the mixture.
6. Garnish with zucchini slices and serve with crackers.
